creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Some ports may trigger rebuild during install due to bugs in build system. For example, emulators/ppsspp, emulators/rpcs3, emulators/yuzu no longer retain +wxneeded after ports 4263e3aac0c0.

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/133amd64-default/3c22ee0df4c5/logs/ppsspp-1.17.1_1.log (good)
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/133amd64-default/ec08b8144657/logs/ppsspp-1.17.1_1.log (bad)

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/133amd64-default/3c22ee0df4c5/logs/rpcs3-0.0.34_1.log (good)
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/133amd64-default/ec08b8144657/logs/rpcs3-0.0.34_1.log (bad)

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/133amd64-default/3c22ee0df4c5/logs/yuzu-s20240301_2.log (good)
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy16/data/133amd64-default/6df70458f823/logs/yuzu-s20240301_2.log (bad)
